title: VictimService
description: A victim resource / community resource offered or referred by the Manhattan District Attorney's Office — organized on manhattanda.org/victim-resources by crime type (child abuse, elder abuse, financial crimes, frauds targeting immigrants, hate crimes, housing/tenant protection, human trafficking, intimate partner & sexual violence, worker protection / wage theft). Reverse-engineered from the site; no structured data source exists, so this is a design-first schema.

provider.description: Delivering organization (the DA's Office or a referred partner).

languages.description: Languages the service is offered in, where published.
